text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just when I think Matikanetannhauser isn't going
to show up to training...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well, on the way here, I ran smack bang into a
wall and ended up getting a bloody nose...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
To make matters worse, it got all over my
tracksuit, so I figured I should wash it straight
away... but then I realized I was all out of laundry
detergent.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Then, while I was looking for detergent, I ended up walking into the door...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Every time something happened, I just wanted to
yell, "Really?! Now?!" Anyway, I'm really sorry...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser seems remorseful about
being late so I let her off with a gentle warning to
be careful in the future.
